fault_hypothesis: The expiration check on line 73 uses a strict inequality (`>`), causing entries to be considered valid when the current time is exactly equal to the expiration time. The check should be inclusive (`>=`) to correctly handle this boundary case.

constraints.intent: An entry at the exact expiration boundary should be considered expired, not valid.
If an entry is considered valid, the current time must be strictly less than its expiration time.
The current time should not be exactly equal to the expiration time when performing the validity check.
